note: ROLLED BACK. Wittig guard attempted as a 3rd pattern-tuning sprint to address post-3c-b top offender (Wittig=10 bleeds). Guard displaced 7 Wittig bleeds but surfaced 7 new bleeds as Wolff-Kishner / Perkin / Henry picked up the slack. Net confused_pairs unchanged (74=74), top3 regressed −1 (218→217). Rolled back to keep 3c-b final state.

branch.family_match: 'wittig' in fam and 'horner' not in fam

stages.note: Short-circuited: admission gate failed, so broad/coverage were not run.

admission_top3.threshold: delta >= -1 (on the edge — technically ok, but paired with no confused_pairs improvement)

confused_pairs.threshold: new < base (strict less-than for primary metric)

gates.decision_rationale: Primary success metric is a strict decrease in admission_confused_pairs. Since new==base and top3 regressed -1, the sprint produced no net benefit — revert.

pairs_fixed_by_3c_c: Ullmann Reaction / Coupling / Biaryl Synthesis -> Wittig Reaction
new_pairs_introduced_by_3c_c: Ullmann Reaction / Coupling / Biaryl Synthesis -> Miyaura Boration
stages.insight: Wittig greediness was downstream of a broader bleed cluster (Wolff-Kishner / Perkin / Henry / Miyaura Boration / Aza-Cope). Surgically penalizing Wittig redistributes the same bleeds elsewhere without reducing confused_pairs. A coordinated 3c-d sprint would need simultaneous guards on all replacement families, or a corpus-diversity (3d) fix for the victim families so their own scores rise above the greedy cluster.

stages.action: Replaced the Phase 3c-c marker block with a retrospective NOTE comment in evidence_search.py so future readers know why there's no 3c-c live branch.

commit_decision: ROLLBACK — reverted to 3c-b final state. Lessons recorded in memory and in the code-comment NOTE.
